creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is ridiculous.

The maintainer has timed out on PRs that weren't accomplished:
  bug 187823
  bug 191894

And also these that were (3 consecutive going back to oct 2013:
  bug 189408
  bug 185144
  bug 182826


Therefore I am resetting this port right not.
Zsolt, please indicate if you want to be the new maintainer.
